title: Cerebro Catalog
description: Schema for cerebro-catalog.yaml — the Cerebro artifact registry format consumed by all Cerebro suite tools (CLI, VS Code, Visual Studio, IntelliJ).

name.description: Optional display name for this catalog or repository.

artifacts.description: List of installable artifacts in this catalog.

sets.description: Named collections of artifacts that can be installed together in one operation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact within the catalog. Lowercase slug (a-z, 0-9, hyphens). Example: 'skill-creator'.

description.description: Short description shown in search results.

tags.description: Optional metadata tags for filtering and discovery.

compatibility.description: List of tool+scope+files entries describing where and how this artifact installs.

tool.description: The AI tool this entry targets.

scope.description: Supported installation scopes. 'workspace' installs into the current project; 'global' installs into the user's home config directory.

files.description: Files or directories to install for this tool+scope combination.

source.description: Path to the file or directory within the source repository. If a directory, the full subtree is mirrored to 'target'.

target.description: Relative install path on the user's machine. For workspace scope, relative to workspace root. For global scope, relative to the user's home directory. Must not contain '..' or begin with '/'.

id.description: Unique identifier for this set. Lowercase slug.

name.description: Human-readable display name for this set.

description.description: Optional description of what this set includes and why.

artifacts.description: List of artifact IDs (from this catalog's 'artifacts' array) to include in this set.
